title: Cloud Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Cloud Engineer with strong AWS Solutions Architecture and AWS Development expertise to design, build, and deploy secure, scalable, and resilient cloud solutions. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience across AWS Best Practices, cloud-native patterns, DevSecOps, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), and agile delivery methodologies. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to craft innovative cloud solutions that drive business value while maintaining operational excellence and compliance.

Responsibilities:

Cloud Architecture & Design

•       Design and implement highly available, scalable, and cost-optimized architectures using AWS Well-Architected Framework and cloud-native design patterns.

•       Translate business requirements into detailed architectural blueprints and solution designs.

•       Evaluate existing workloads and modernize applications using AWS services, serverless technologies, containers, and microservices architectures. Cloud Development & Automation

•       Develop cloud-native applications and automation workflows using AWS SDKs, Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, Step Functions, ECS/EKS, and other AWS services.

•       Implement and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools such as AWS CloudFormation, Terraform, or CDK.

•       Build automation for provisioning, configuration, deployment, and operational tasks to improve eQiciency and reduce manual workloads. DevSecOps & CI/CD

•       Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines using AWS CodePipeline, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, or Jenkins.

•       Embed security controls into pipelines, enabling automated compliance, code scanning, and artifact validation.

•       Implement monitoring, logging, and observability using CloudWatch, X-Ray, OpenTelemetry, and other monitoring tools.

Security, Governance & Compliance

•       Apply AWS security best practices across IAM, VPC, encryption, secrets, networking, and data protection.

•       Ensure solutions comply with organizational, industry, and regulatory standards.

•       Support threat modelling, risk assessments, and automated security policy enforcement.

Collaboration & Delivery

•       Work within an agile environment—participate in sprint planning, backlog refinement, and iterative delivery.

•       Collaborate with product owners, business analysts, developers, and security teams to deliver end-to-end cloud solutions.

•       Provide technical guidance, perform code reviews, and mentor junior engineers if needed.

Required skills and qualifications:

•       Degree in Computer Science, Computing, Electrical Engineering, IT or equivalent.

•       At least 2 years of working experience in the Information Technology industry, preferably in the areas of AWS Cloud implementation and support

•       Strong hands-on experience with core AWS services (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, Lambda, SQS, RDS, DynamoDB, API Gateway, ECS/EKS, CloudFront, etc.).

•       Proven background in AWS architecture design and AWS development.

•       Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Node.js, Java, or Go.

•       Experience with IaC tools (CloudFormation, Terraform, AWS CDK).

•       Knowledge of AWS Well-Architected Framework, cloud-native patterns, serverless architectures, and event-driven designs.

•       Strong understanding of CI/CD, DevSecOps pipelines, and automated testing.

•       Experience with containerization (Docker) and orchestration (EKS/Kubernetes or ECS).

•       Excellent problem-solving and analytical abilities.

•       Strong communication skills to articulate technical solutions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

•       Ability to work independently and collaboratively in cross-functional teams.

•       Passion for innovation, automation, and continuous improvement

•       Ability to quickly learn new technology and apply new skills Preferred skills and qualifications:

•       AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate or Professional (highly preferred).

•       AWS Certified Developer – Associate.

•       Experience with cloud cost management and optimization.

•       Familiarity with zero-trust architectures, cloud security tooling, and compliance frameworks.

•       Experience in multi-account architectures using AWS Organizations and Control Tower.
